channel.title: Posts on EternalFrustAtion
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on EternalFrustAtion

item.title: Adding Some Animations
item.description: Animations and exam Today, we added some animations to this website, pretty simple using a tiny bit of javascript and css’s transition property. Oh, and also, i needed to give some time to study for my physics exam tommorow. Hopefully, it won’t be that hard. Now that i have added animation, i was thinking we could add a subtle background, something geometric, like hexagons or something might look good. For now, i guess we can just sleep.

item.title: Making This Website
item.description: New Website, Yay? So, I have made a new website and uploaded it to github and i am going to be using this as a general platfrom to keep myself a little organised. Now, to fill this empty space beneath this text, lets walk through how i went about creating this beautiful masterpiece that is definitely not made using a template The previous website As you may have noticed, there was a website on this domain before this one.
